---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new script, cmdlet, or improvement to an existing one
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Vibhu2
---

## Is your feature request related to a problem?

A clear description of the problem or gap you've encountered.
e.g. "I often need to audit X but there's no script for it..."

## Describe the solution you'd like

What you would like to see added or changed.

## Describe alternatives you've considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've already tried.

## Use case / environment

- **Applies to:** (e.g. ITAdmin_Public_Scripts / VB.ServerInventory / VB.WorkstationReport / VB.NextCloud)
- **Environment:** (e.g. Windows Server 2022, MSP, standalone workstation)
- **PowerShell version:** (e.g. 5.1 / 7.x)

## Additional context

Any other information, examples, or references that would help.
